name: testErrorMessageForReversedDateRange
description: Error message is displayed when start date is after end date.
descriptionHtml: Error message is displayed when start date is after end date.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Error message is displayed when start date is after end date.

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Set start and end date: 01-04-2025 to 01-04-2024
Verify: error message is shown for invalid date range
